'''âs-w-j''' ('''kasawaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:neofunctionalise|neofunctionalise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-w-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:neofunctionalise|neofunctionalise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-w-j
|-
! Lemma
| kasawaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisawaj|thisawaj]] || [[word:jisawaj|jisawaj]] || [[word:shisawaj|shisawaj]] || [[word:kisawaj|kisawaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusawaj|thuthusawaj]] || [[word:jujusawaj|jujusawaj]] || [[word:shushusawaj|shushusawaj]] || [[word:kukusawaj|kukusawaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusawaj|thusawaj]] || [[word:jusawaj|jusawaj]] || [[word:shusawaj|shusawaj]] || [[word:kusawaj|kusawaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusawaj|thusawaj]] || [[word:jusawaj|jusawaj]] || [[word:shusawaj|shusawaj]] || [[word:kusawaj|kusawaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesawaj|thesawaj]] || [[word:jesawaj|jesawaj]] || [[word:shesawaj|shesawaj]] || [[word:kesawaj|kesawaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosawaj|thothosawaj]] || [[word:jojosawaj|jojosawaj]] || [[word:shoshosawaj|shoshosawaj]] || [[word:kokosawaj|kokosawaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosawaj|thosawaj]] || [[word:josawaj|josawaj]] || [[word:shosawaj|shosawaj]] || [[word:kosawaj|kosawaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosawaj|thosawaj]] || [[word:josawaj|josawaj]] || [[word:shosawaj|shosawaj]] || [[word:kosawaj|kosawaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsawaj|thĂŠsawaj]] || [[word:jĂŠsawaj|jĂŠsawaj]] || [[word:shĂŠsawaj|shĂŠsawaj]] || [[word:kĂŠsawaj|kĂŠsawaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasawaj|thathasawaj]] || [[word:jajasawaj|jajasawaj]] || [[word:shashasawaj|shashasawaj]] || [[word:kakasawaj|kakasawaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasawaj|thasawaj]] || [[word:jasawaj|jasawaj]] || [[word:shasawaj|shasawaj]] || [[word:kasawaj|kasawaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasawaj|thasawaj]] || [[word:jasawaj|jasawaj]] || [[word:shasawaj|shasawaj]] || [[word:kasawaj|kasawaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasawaj|shasawaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasawaj|goshasawaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasawaj|gokishasawaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasawajnĂŒ|shasawajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasawajnknĂŒ|goshasawajnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasawajnĂŒ|gokishasawajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasawajshĂ«|shasawajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasawajnkshĂ«|goshasawajnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasawajshĂ«|gokishasawajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasawajro|shasawajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasawajnkro|goshasawajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasawajro|gokishasawajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasawajmu|shasawajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasawajnkmu|goshasawajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasawajmu|gokishasawajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasawajsher|shasawajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasawajnksher|goshasawajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasawajsher|gokishasawajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasawajng|shasawajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasawajnkng|goshasawajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasawajng|gokishasawajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasawajya|shasawajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasawajnkya|goshasawajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasawajya|gokishasawajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasawajyam|shasawajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasawajnkyam|goshasawajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasawajyam|gokishasawajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasawajnĂŒshĂ«|shasawajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasawajnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasawajnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasawajnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasawajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasawajnĂŒro|shasawajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasawajnknĂŒro|goshasawajnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasawajnĂŒro|gokishasawajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasawajnĂŒmu|shasawajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasawajnknĂŒmu|goshasawajnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasawajnĂŒmu|gokishasawajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasawajshĂ«nĂŒ|shasawajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasawajnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasawajnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasawajshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasawajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasawajshĂ«ro|shasawajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasawajnkshĂ«ro|goshasawajnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasawajshĂ«ro|gokishasawajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasawajshĂ«mu|shasawajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasawajnkshĂ«mu|goshasawajnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasawajshĂ«mu|gokishasawajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasawajronĂŒ|shasawajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasawajnkronĂŒ|goshasawajnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasawajronĂŒ|gokishasawajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasawajroshĂ«|shasawajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasawajnkroshĂ«|goshasawajnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasawajroshĂ«|gokishasawajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasawajromu|shasawajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasawajnkromu|goshasawajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasawajromu|gokishasawajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasawajmunĂŒ|shasawajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasawajnkmunĂŒ|goshasawajnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasawajmunĂŒ|gokishasawajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasawajmushĂ«|shasawajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasawajnkmushĂ«|goshasawajnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasawajmushĂ«|gokishasawajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasawajmuro|shasawajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasawajnkmuro|goshasawajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasawajmuro|gokishasawajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
